name: voyacampaign
description: Voya campaign skills — turn a content idea into an on-brand image and a Seedance 2.0 Fast video via the Higgsfield MCP.
author: Voya

skills.name: voya-brand-context
skills.description: Define or update the Voya brand & visual identity in one persistent context file.

skills.name: voya-image
skills.description: Generate an on-brand image with the Higgsfield MCP; returns a reusable job_id.

skills.name: voya-video
skills.description: Animate an image (or text) into a Seedance 2.0 Fast video via the Higgsfield MCP.

skills.name: voya-campaign
skills.description: End-to-end: brand context to image to video to a per-platform post package.
